question.Q: Do the horses in Toyotomi Hideyoshi on his horse with his unique helmet and the digitally retouched photograph of a Tang dynasty painting of two prized horses and one rider both show dark horses with white fur above each hoof ?
A: The horses in Toyotomi Hideyoshi on his horse with his unique helmet and the digitally retouched photograph of a Tang dynasty painting of two prized horses and one rider both show dark horses with white fur above each hoof.
